title: BBC精选
desc: 英国广播公司权威新闻与深度报道，包含气候变化、科技前沿及文化解析。

lessons.title: 全球气候峰会新承诺
lessons.transcript: At the recent climate summit in London, world leaders have pledged to cut methane emissions by 30 percent before 2030. The new commitment also includes financial support for developing nations to adopt green energy. Environmental groups welcomed the announcement but warned that verification systems must be strengthened. The British Prime Minister called it a historic step forward in the fight against global warming.

lessons.title: 人工智能监管白皮书发布
lessons.transcript: The UK government has unveiled a white paper on artificial intelligence regulation, focusing on transparency and accountability. The proposed rules aim to balance innovation with public safety. Tech companies will be required to label AI-generated content clearly. Critics argue that the framework lacks enforcement mechanisms, while supporters believe it sets a global standard for responsible AI development.

lessons.title: 大英博物馆归还文物谈判
lessons.transcript: Officials from Greece and the UK have resumed talks over the return of the Parthenon sculptures, also known as the Elgin Marbles. The British Museum has expressed willingness to explore a long-term loan agreement. Greek authorities insist on permanent repatriation. Cultural experts say a compromise could set a precedent for other disputed artifacts worldwide.

title: VOA慢速英语
desc: VOA官方授权慢速英语节目，语速适中，适合初级至中级学习者。

lessons.title: 美国国家公园游客创新高
lessons.transcript: Visitors to America's national parks reached a record high last year. More than 300 million people visited parks like Yellowstone and Yosemite. Officials say many people want to spend time in nature after the pandemic. They also remind visitors to follow safety rules and protect wildlife.

lessons.title: 科学家发现新种珊瑚
lessons.transcript: Marine biologists have discovered a new species of coral in the deep waters near Hawaii. The pink and purple coral lives at depths of over 2000 meters. Researchers say it is important to protect these fragile ecosystems from deep-sea mining. The discovery was published in the journal Marine Biology.

title: VOA常速英语
desc: VOA标准语速新闻，涵盖政治、经济、科技等实时话题。

lessons.title: 美联储宣布降息25个基点
lessons.transcript: The Federal Reserve cut interest rates by a quarter percentage point on Wednesday, citing cooling inflation and a stable labor market. Chair Jerome Powell indicated that further cuts are possible later this year if economic data continues to show moderation. Stock markets responded with modest gains, while some economists warned about potential asset bubbles.

lessons.title: 欧盟通过数字市场法案修正案
lessons.transcript: European Union lawmakers have approved amendments to the Digital Markets Act, imposing stricter obligations on tech giants. The new rules require messaging apps to be interoperable and give users more control over their data. Companies that violate the regulations could face fines of up to 10 percent of global annual revenue.

title: 经济学人合集
desc: 《经济学人》周刊精选文章，聚焦全球商业、金融与国际关系。

lessons.title: 半导体供应链重构
lessons.transcript: A new report from The Economist examines the reshaping of global semiconductor supply chains. The United States and Europe are investing billions to reduce reliance on East Asian foundries. However, experts note that building domestic capacity will take years and may not fully replace existing networks. The article also discusses the strategic implications for the tech industry.

lessons.title: 远程办公对城市商业地产的冲击
lessons.transcript: Permanent remote work arrangements have led to record vacancy rates in office buildings across major cities like San Francisco and London. Property owners are converting empty spaces into residential units or storage facilities. The shift is also affecting local businesses that rely on weekday foot traffic, such as cafes and dry cleaners. Urban planners are rethinking the future of downtown districts.

title: VOA慢速-时事新闻
desc: VOA慢速英语 In the News 系列，聚焦每周热点事件。

lessons.title: 印度成功登月任务
lessons.transcript: India has become the fourth country to successfully land a spacecraft on the moon. The Chandrayaan-3 mission touched down near the lunar south pole. Scientists hope to find water ice in the region. The mission is a major success for the Indian Space Research Organization and inspires young scientists across the country.

lessons.title: 法国农民抗议欧盟环保新规
lessons.transcript: French farmers blocked highways near Paris to protest new European Union environmental rules. They say the regulations make it harder to grow crops and raise animals. The government has promised to discuss their concerns. The protest is the latest in a series of farmer demonstrations across Europe.

title: 科学美国人
desc: 《科学美国人》60秒科学栏目，托福雅思听力绝佳训练材料。

lessons.title: 章鱼神经系统的独特演化
lessons.transcript: A new study in Nature reveals that octopuses have a unique nervous system that allows each arm to make decisions independently. Researchers mapped the neural pathways and found that two-thirds of the neurons are located in the arms. This decentralized structure may explain their remarkable problem-solving abilities and escape tactics.

lessons.title: 小行星样本返回地球
lessons.transcript: NASA's OSIRIS-REx mission successfully returned samples from the asteroid Bennu. The capsule landed in the Utah desert containing about 250 grams of rocky material. Scientists believe these pristine samples could reveal clues about the formation of the solar system and the origin of organic molecules. Preliminary analysis shows high carbon and water content.

title: NPR News
desc: 美国国家公共电台新闻，每周更新，涵盖社会文化与科技。

lessons.title: 美国图书馆电子书借阅争议
lessons.transcript: Librarians across the United States are raising concerns about the rising cost of e-books for public libraries. Major publishers charge libraries up to five times the consumer price for digital copies, which expire after a limited number of borrows. The American Library Association is urging lawmakers to pass legislation that ensures fair access to digital content.

lessons.title: 人工智能生成音乐版权案开庭
lessons.transcript: A federal court in New York heard arguments in a landmark case about whether AI-generated music can be copyrighted. The plaintiff, a composer, used an AI tool to create melodies but wants exclusive rights. The defendant argues that without human authorship, the music belongs to the public domain. The ruling could reshape the creative industry.

title: TED演讲视频
desc: TED官方授权演讲，启发思考的创新观点与前沿研究。

lessons.title: 如何培养孩子的数字韧性
lessons.transcript: In this TED talk, psychologist Devorah Heitner explains why digital resilience is more important than screen time limits. She suggests that parents should have open conversations about online experiences rather than imposing strict bans. Her research shows that children who learn to navigate challenges online are less likely to suffer from cyberbullying and social comparison.

lessons.title: 深海未知生态系统的启示
lessons.transcript: Marine biologist Edith Widder shares stunning footage of bioluminescent creatures from the deep ocean. She argues that we have explored less than five percent of the ocean floor and that new species are waiting to be discovered. Her work highlights the urgent need for marine protected areas before deep-sea mining destroys these fragile habitats.

title: AP News
desc: 美联社一分钟新闻，每日更新，快速掌握全球动态。

lessons.title: 墨西哥通过司法改革法案
lessons.transcript: Mexico's Congress has approved a sweeping judicial reform that changes how judges are selected. The new system replaces appointments with popular elections for some federal judges. Supporters say it fights corruption, while critics worry about politicizing the courts. The president is expected to sign the bill into law next week.

lessons.title: 国际空间站宇航员完成太空行走
lessons.transcript: Two astronauts from the United States and Japan completed a six-hour spacewalk outside the International Space Station. They installed new solar panels and replaced a faulty camera module. NASA officials confirmed that all objectives were met without any safety issues. The space station continues to operate with a full crew of seven.

lessons.title: 威尼斯开始收取游客入城费
lessons.transcript: Venice has launched a pilot program charging day-trippers a five-euro entry fee on peak weekends. The measure aims to reduce overcrowding and encourage longer stays. Local residents and hotel guests are exempt. Early data shows a slight decrease in visitor numbers, but officials say it is too early to determine long-term effects.
